titleStmt.title: SII 38.288: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 288. (A.R. No. 288 of 1912.) ŚIVANKŪḌAL, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the east wall of the maṇḍapa, infront of the central shrine, Śivakoḻunḍīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Achchutadēva Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1455, Jaya, Mēsha śu. di. 12 uttira 5 Monday = 1533 A.D. April 6.

summary.p: Records that Ellappa Nāyaka, son of Cheṭṭiyappa-Nāyakkar, an official (ūḻiyam) of Achchudaiyadēva Mahārāya had endowed lands at Kūttāpākkam, a village of Obaḷarasanallūr which was in Śivaṉkūḍal in Mappēḍu-sīrmai. The latter territorial division, which was in Nīrvēḷūr-nāḍu in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭu-kōṭṭam in Chandragiri-rājyam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam, was assigned to Ellappa Nāyakar as amaranāyakkattaṉam by the ruling king. It is stated that he made this grant inorder to conduct offerings, worship, oblations and other rituals to the god Śivakoḻundanāyinār in Śivaṉkūḍal. It is also recorded that he made this grant at the holy precints of the god Virupākshadēvar (situated) on the bank of the river, Tuṅgabhadra for the merit of his father Cheṭṭiyappa-Nāyakkar and mother Vaśavammāḷ. Further it also records that the granted lands were to be irrigated through the same canals as the earlier days. The accountant of the village Mūṟtiyappaṉ, son of Dāṉappiḷḷai, wrote this deed.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cuvastiśrī . maṉmahāmaṇṭalecura Irācāti Irācarāca paramecura śrīvirapratāpa śrīvira Accutaiya tevamahārāyar prataviRead prativirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 5 10 5ṉ mel cellā niṉṟa jayavaruṣam meṣanāyaṟṟu pūṟvapakṣattu tuvāteciyum Uttira nakṣattiramum peṟṟa comavārattunāḷ śvāmi Accutaiyadeva makārāyarūḻiyam ceṭṭiyappa nā
yakkar puttiraṉ Ellappanāyakkareṉ namakku śvāmi Amaranāyakka taṉamākap pālittaruḷiṉa ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu cantiṟakirirācciyattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukoṭṭattil nirveḷur nāṭṭil mappeṭṭuciṉmaiyukkuḷRead cirmaiyuḷcivaṉkūṭal piṭākaiyāṉa Opaḷaracanallūr kiṟāmam Oṉṟukku caturcirmai kūttapākkattil Ellaikku kiḻakku marutamaṅkalattil
Ellaikku kiḻakku peri Eriykkuḷ vataṭṭitāṅkalkkaraikku teṟku civaṉkūṭal Aracaṅkuḻikku meṟku mallaiyapurattil Ellaikku vaṭakku Inta nāṟpākku Ellaiyum civaṉkūṭal civakoḻunta nayinār tampirāṉāṟku pūcainaivettiyam(t) tiruppaṇi tipāṟātinaikkum Urittāka vicayanakar virupākṣatevarcaṉṉatiyil tuṅkapattiṟa tirattile
nammiṭa takappaṉār ceṭṭiyappanāyakkaṟkum nammiṭa tāyār vacavammāḷukkum puṇṇiyamāka civaṉkūṭal civakkoḻunta tampirāṉāṟku tāraivāttu kuṭuttom Inta taṉmam cantiṟātittavaraikkum naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum civaṉkūṭal periya Eri ciṟṟeri taṇṇir pūṟuvāparamāka Enta Entak kālile pāñcu vantutuRead vantatu
Appiṭiye pāyakkaṭavatākavum Aṟiṉir muṟai niṟkum Appaṭiye pāyak kaṭavatākavum Intataṉmattukku yātoruvar Akitam paṇṇak kaṭavar Allavākavum yātoruvar Akitam paṇṇiṉavaṉ Uṇṭāṉāl keṅkaikkaraiyile kārāmpacuvai koṉṟa pāpattile poka kaṭavaṉ Ākavum tāytakappanaiyum
prāmaṇanaiyum koṉṟa pāpattile pokak kaṭavaṉākavum yinta cācanam Eḻutina(na)maikku Ūrkaṇakku tāṉappiḷḷai kumāraṉ muṟtiyappaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 38.288 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
